name: Service Requests
description: Citizen service request system with submission forms, map pin placement, kanban tracking, and status timelines. Enables residents to report issues and track resolution.

page_briefs.requests: Service request management page offers both a data table view with sortable columns for request id, category, location, reporter, status, assigned crew, priority, and SLA age, and a kanban board view with columns for Submitted, Triaged, In Progress, Resolved, and Closed. Users can toggle between views for different workflows.
page_briefs.new-request: New request submission page splits into a form-sections panel on the left with category selector, description textarea, photo uploader, and contact fields, paired with a pin-mode map view on the right where the citizen drops a marker on the exact location of the issue. The selected coordinates auto-populate the form.
page_briefs.request-detail: Request detail page shows a detail header with request id, category icon, reporter, location address, current status pill, assigned crew, and priority. Below, a status timeline renders every event from submission through triage, assignment, work orders, resolution, and closure, each entry timestamped with the actor and attached photos or notes.

shells.sidebar-main: Left sidebar with request categories and main content area
